goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the 'centre' and should be in the type of 'entertainment'.
If there is no such attraction, how about one that is in 'the type of architecture'.
Make sure you get 'entrance fee'.
You are also looking for a 'train'. The train should depart from 'london liverpool street' and should 'arrive by 09:00'.
The train should leave on 'tuesday' and should go to 'cambridge'.
Make sure you get 'departure time', 'travel time', and 'price'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the centre and should be in the type of entertainment
If there is no such attraction, how about one that is in the type of architecture
Make sure you get entrance fee
You are also looking for a train. The train should depart from london liverpool street and should arrive by 09:00
The train should leave on tuesday and should go to cambridge
Make sure you get departure time, travel time, and price
